description: CompositionBurgundy and navy blue dobby weave shirt made of a blended fabric, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with panel detailing on the inseam, button placket, patch pocket on the upper left chest and a curved hemlineFittingSlimWash careDry clean onlyThe burgundy and navy blue dobby weave in miniature paisley design adds sophisticated styling to this shirt from turtle. The soft blended fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day, while the fashionable cuts offer a flattering Fit. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa, making it an environment friendly choice. Team this with black formal pants and classy accessories.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 39"
